breaking.title: Why tanks still matter in modern warfare
breaking.summary: Drones, missiles and precision-guided weapons have transformed the modern battlefield, but military experts argue they cannot achieve the ultimate objective of war – controlling territory. Saurabh Trivedi examines why tanks and ground forces remain indispensable despite the rapid evolution of warfare, drawing on lessons from Ukraine and insights from senior Army officers

breaking.title: Woman whose dog was killed by LAPD cops sues police department: Jameson did not growl at either officer, no attempt to attack them
McDonald's, bus station turn quake clinics in Venezuela
breaking.summary: Following devastating earthquakes in Venezuela, a McDonald's in La Guaira has transformed into a vital clinic, treating hundreds daily for critical conditions like hypertensive crises and anxiety. With hospitals overwhelmed and infrastructure destroyed, makeshift centers in places like bus terminals are the only hope for thousands. Doctors, like those who survived the quakes themselves, are working tirelessly amidst unimaginable devastation to provide essential care.

breaking.title: 'JUST&T MARRIED' Swift, Kelce host massive New York wedding bash
breaking.summary: Pop sensation Taylor Swift and NFL star Travis Kelce have tied the knot in a star-studded ceremony at Madison Square Garden. The surprise wedding, officiated by Adam Sandler, saw Swift's brother as man of honor and Jason Kelce as best man. The couple, who donated $26 million to charity, celebrated their union amidst a throng of fans and celebrities, marking a new chapter in their widely publicized romance.

breaking.title: Moment of destiny for France's Le Pen in verdict to decide her future in presidential race
breaking.summary: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen is appealing a verdict which found her guilty of misusing EU funds.

breaking.title: Odisha doctors call of strike after government assurances
breaking.summary: Due to the doctors’ strike, the health service has been crippled across the State

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Huge crowds throng Tehran for Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral ceremonies
breaking.summary: Authorities unveiled the casket containing Khamenei's body in a glass case at the Grand Mosalla in Tehran, Iran's capital

breaking.title: Fresh political support pours in on 15th day of CJP protest; student hospitalised
breaking.summary: Activist Sonam Wangchuk continues seventh day of his hunger strike; political leaders say will raise the issue of irregularities in examinations during Parliament’s upcoming Monsoon Session
